basics.name: Hongli Zhao
basics.label: PhD Student
basics.summary: A PhD student in Computational and Applied Mathematics at University of Chicago.

work.name: Argonne National Laboratory
work.summary: Research in scientific computing and optimization for power systems.

awards.title: McCormick Fellowship
awards.awarder: Physical Sciences Division, University of Chicago
awards.summary: A one-time award for highly-rated incoming Ph.D. students.

awards.title: International House Non-Resident Graduate Fellowship
awards.summary: Awarded for leadership abilities, involvement in community and university organizations, extracurricular interests in areas such as performing arts, athletics, and cultural activities, participation in community service, and contributions to increasing diversity.

awards.title: Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowship (SURF)
awards.awarder: Office of Undergraduate Research and Scholarships, UC Berkeley
awards.summary: Summer research fellowship awarded for selected student research proposals from letters & science.
